name: identifier_heavy_developer
raw_text:
pub struct ChunkRoute holds the chunk-first retrieval pipeline.
The route uses prefix_query_for_search to build the BGE input string.
It calls Embedder::new_bge_v5_for_query to construct the 1024-d query embedder.
It then invokes chunk_vector_search on the store to fetch ranked child hits.
Finally, assemble_chunk_parent_results groups the chunks by memory id and attaches winning evidence.
